output:
All services are up. Here's the report:

<deploy-report>
## Status: ✅ All services healthy — pre-existing shared stack

**Provisioning result:** `docker-compose.harness.yml` startup was attempted but aborted — ports 9428 and 8428 are already bound by an identical shared stack (`codeharness-shared-*`) that has been running for 12 days. No action needed; the environment is fully operational.

---

## Containers

| Container | Image | Status | Uptime |
|---|---|---|---|
| `codeharness-shared-victoria-logs-1` | `victoriametrics/victoria-logs:v1.15.0-victorialogs` | ✅ running | 12 days |
| `codeharness-shared-victoria-metrics-1` | `victoriametrics/victoria-metrics:v1.106.1` | ✅ running | 12 days |
| `codeharness-shared-otel-collector-1` | `otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib:0.96.0` | ✅ running | 12 days |
| `codeharness-verify` | `codeharness-verify` | ✅ running | 8 days |

---

## URLs

| Service | URL | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| VictoriaLogs | http://localhost:9428 | Log ingestion & query |
| VictoriaMetrics | http://localhost:8428 | Metrics storage & query |
| OTLP gRPC | localhost:4317 | Trace/metric ingest (gRPC) |
| OTLP HTTP | localhost:4318 | Trace/metric ingest (HTTP) |
| Jaeger UI | http://localhost:16686 | Trace visualization |

---

## Credentials

None — all services are unauthenticated (local dev stack).

---

## Health

| Service | Endpoint | Result |
|---|---|---|
| VictoriaLogs | `GET /health` | `OK` ✅ |
| VictoriaMetrics | `GET /health` | `OK` ✅ |
| OTel Collector | port 4317 (gRPC) | reachable ✅ |

---

## Notes

- **Port conflict:** `docker-compose.harness.yml` defines the same ports as the already-running shared stack. They cannot both bind simultaneously. The shared stack is functionally identical (same image versions), so no new stack is needed.
- **`codeharness-verify`** container is also running (8 days) — no healthcheck configured on that container.
- No credentials, no volumes to initialize, no migrations to run.
</deploy-report>
